Subject: UBSW 401 K information
Message:
All UBSW Energy employees can now go out and register on-line for you 401K plan selections. Individual fund investment performance can also be reviewed on-line once you have set up your password.  Due to the timing of the electronic feeds to Hewitt, your contributions will not begin until the 3/15 paycheck. 

Savings & Investment Plan - 401(k)
1-888-251-2500
Can talk to a person directly from 9:30am - 6:00pm EST (call the # above, press *0)
www.resources.hewitt.com/ubs <http://www.resources.hewitt.com/ubs>
